title.en: He hadn't been asleep for long, so the Terrans ...

content.en:
Time flies.

Ye Tian's life pattern transformation was very slow, but he was not in a hurry, and his other replica bodies could move freely.

He hadn't been asleep for long, so the Terrans hadn't changed much.

However, now that he has returned, the Terrans will have to change a little.

Compared to the creatures of the Ancient Demon Era, the life of the human race is too fragile, and the physical body is not a grade.

Therefore, he imitated the body of the ancient demon clan, combined with the body of the human race, and tried to create a resource to transform the body of the human race, even if it was not as good as the body of the ancient demon clan, at least it had to be able to make the human race easily break through to the Nine Realms and even the ultimate realm master.

After a long period of time, Ye Tian got a lot of precious resources and tried to refine a thing.

On this day, he continued to fuse and condense many resources, and gathered space-time particles from heaven and earth, integrated into them, and gradually turned into a liquid thing.

"Time and Space Ancient Liquid!"

This is something that Ye Tian has refined, it can transform the body of the human race, and with the help of the new ultimate system he created, if the talent is not bad, he can easily break through to the peak of the Nine Realms, and the best can easily break through to the ultimate realm master.

Soon.

The space-time ancient liquid has been distributed, and any first-realm existence of an ordinary extradimensional realm can obtain a copy of the space-time ancient liquid, while the weaker human race can only use the space-time ancient liquid diluted countless times.

Rumble!!!!!

In the territory of the human race, a supreme superdimensional realm powerhouse has broken through, after obtaining the ancient liquid of time and space, some shackles, bottlenecks and sequelae have dissipated, their cultivation has skyrocketed, and the life pattern of the body is also optimizing and transforming, and the bloodline has skyrocketed tenfold or hundredfold.

Henceforth.

It will be a hundred times easier for them to cultivate.

In a short period of time, all the high-level members of the human race took the space-time ancient liquid, their bodies transformed, their life levels spanned several levels, and their cultivation efficiency skyrocketed.

Moreover, Ye Tian has also created the Ultimate Realm Master System that is most suitable for the human high-level at this time, which can also be said to be the Ultimate Extreme Exalted System, which can be cultivated all the way to the Ultimate Supreme Venerable Realm.

"Terran Origin System!"

This kind of system is the continuous optimization of oneself, using one's own body to fight against the ten thousand paths, step by step towards the ultimate supreme body, and can also absorb a trace of space-time particles from heaven and earth, so as to transform the body, so that the body foundation is more and more terrifying.

Of course, non-geniuses can't realize this way, but the human race also has other paths to take, but the cultivation efficiency will be much slower.

In the years that followed, the human race successively gave birth to a large number of Ultimate Realm Lords, and there were also Ultimate Realm Masters who condensed the ultimate body and achieved the rank of giants.

And Ye Tian's son, Ye Xingchen, easily broke through to the peak of the ancient level, which was equivalent to the peak of the emperor level of the ancient demon era.

At the peak of the Eternal Level, Ye Xingchen was also qualified to impact the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, but his foundation was too shallow, and it was too difficult to become the Ultimate Supreme Venerable in this era, a hundred times more difficult than the Ancient Demon Era.

Therefore, Ye Tian naturally would not let his son impact the Ultimate Extreme Venerable right now.

So, he personally perfected the life pattern in his son's body, let him go to enlightenment, and after he realized it, he would improve the life pattern in his body, so that the ultimate body could be transformed.

After that, he created a large number of ultimate arcane arts, which his son could enlighten and inspire.

Moreover, he often gives instructions to make Ye Xingchen's background more and more sufficient.

After that, Ye Tian's wives and daughters also broke through to the Eternal Realm, and their foundation was extremely terrifying, far beyond the other Eternal Realm of this era, and they might be able to beat the Eternal Realm of this era at any time.

Another long time has passed.

What's more, he also has a terrifying space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, of course, with his current cultivation, he can't cast such an Ultimate Arcane, but there is no problem in casting the Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, and he can burst out with a few moves.

Of course, normal attacks, using the pinnacle ultimate arcane are enough.

"After the transformation of the life pattern, the body is the ultimate body of the Extreme Dao, and it needs to be constantly tempered and cultivated before it can break through to the true top ultimate supreme realm. The realms of other top Ultimate Extreme Masters are just incomplete, even if they are Doomsday Extreme Honors, they are also lacking in foundation, and they may not necessarily be able to beat some of the top Ancient Demon level existences in the Ancient Demon Era. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, he doesn't care about the foundation of Doomsday Exalted Extreme, he only needs to care about himself.

In the following days, Ye Tian was also looking for various treasures, looking for resources suitable for him, but unfortunately he couldn't find useful resources.

The resources of this era are too poor.

After that, he came to the place where the Ancient Demon Level, the Ultimate Ancient Demon Slumber.

Sure enough, there are at least sixty ultimate ancient demons who have survived, at least 100,000 ancient demons, and the weakest one is probably comparable to the top ancient demon level. "

"These ancient demons are sleeping here, it seems that there is a problem with their will, and their bodies are also damaged, why haven't any of them awakened?"

Ye Tian was also very curious, but he did not enter this area, he knew very well that this area was connected with the breath of these sleeping ancient demons, and once he stepped in, he would be suppressed by the breath of all ancient demons.

With his current strength, he couldn't compete with the aura of so many ancient demon-level powerhouses on his own, and he would be directly crushed.

Of course, when he stepped into the realm of the ultimate ancient demon, that is, the realm of the Extreme Dao Extreme Venerable in this era, he could try to go in and find out.

As for now, he still honestly improves his strength.

In the following long years, Ye Tian used some ordinary resources to improve his strength, and at the same time extracted space-time particles from heaven and earth to strengthen himself, but unfortunately his cultivation speed was too slow, and it was not as good as the cultivation speed of one percent in the ancient demon era. []

That is to say, his realm is really too high, and he can forcibly devour space-time particles, so he can make more amazing progress.

this day.

Ye Tian and Doomsday Jizun and Shadow Sha Jizun got together to chat again, for them, it was difficult to make progress in cultivation, and sitting together and chatting was also a relief for boredom.

"Doomsday Extremity, Shadow Sand Exaltation, do you know where there are resources suitable for us?"

Ye Tian asked.

Immediately, he added, "Except for those ancient demons sleeping places!"

Doomsday Supreme Venerable shook his head, "This era is too weak to give birth to many resources at all, and it is really too difficult to be of great help to an Ultimate Supreme Venerable like me. "。
